title: Evangelion RPG
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion RPG?             Quote Post by Sventevith » Sun May 08, 2005 6:06 pm Guardians of Order: Big Eyes Small Mouth: Neon Genesis Evangelion Book Anyone have any more information about this?

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Sun May 08, 2005 7:33 pm Didn't the Monkey try to get an advance review copy thing....?

[]:             Quote Post by Sventevith » Sun May 08, 2005 8:02 pm I'm relative new to the site, and I've tried to find information - some pages said it was a RPG, some said it was a cardgame, some said it was a guide to episode 1-13 and then 14-26... I'm not really sure what it is!

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sun May 08, 2005 9:03 pm I could tell you, but then I'd have to kill you.

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Mon May 09, 2005 6:54 am you can tell me, i'm already dead.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 09, 2005 1:39 pm There's earlier stuff on this Other BESM anime supplements - though I wouldn't hold my breath. They'ev been hit badly by the collapse of the $US and have cut back on their release cycles - the 3rd Utena book, originally due in February, is still nowhere to be seen on their site http://www.guardiansorder.com/games/besm/products.php While we're waiting, you could try this How one might use other pen&paper RPGs There is also the Japanese language RPG mentioned in the back of vol8 of the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Sventevith » Tue May 10, 2005 2:09 am Ah, I see... maybe I should've done a search on the board before I posted anything, thanks for the information :)
